full_text:
Gongsun Ji 公孫紀
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gongsun Ji (公孫紀)was born in Liaoxi?. Well treated by Gongsun Zan, he warned the general of Liu Yu’s plans to attack. Gongsun Ji was affiliated with Liu Yu.
